MANTA MEME SEASON going BONKERS
Bonk x Manta: Dual Citizenship
BONK is coming to Manta! To celebrate, we have a season of activities and rewards for the BONK community.
Start earning rewards with the first (of many) activity: verifying that you're an active member in both the BONK and Manta communities.
Claim details to come very soon.
Stay tuned on Manta Network Twitter for more announcements.
Start Earning Rewards
